raw_consumer_statement: See letter. I made an order for multiple items from XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. Some of the parts were canceled by merchant because of " XXXX inventory '' ( XXXX : XXXX and XXXX ). The merchant agreed in writing to refund me but never issued the credit. Another item did not show up in a box sent from the merchant ( SKU XXXX ), the box had a large hole in it ( see photo ) ). I was offered a refund for this item but the merchant also never refunded me. I disputed the case with Amex and they found in the merchants favor, citing the merchant shipped out a box. Amex did not consider the details in my claim, and just used the tracking number to decline my whole claim.
